generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect real-time temperature data from physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that detect occupancy in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorData
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that measure light levels in building areas"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorData
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from sensors and control logic for runtime synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device-specific metadata for Building Control Systems (BCS), including geometric, spatial, and functional data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Revit, EclipseDitto
]

instance ModularArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating multiple service-oriented components, enabling decentralized implementation of component-specific twins within a unified digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, Interactive3DVisualizationService, TwinningProcessService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool for model creation and semantic enrichment"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModel
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators for HVAC system to adjust building temperature"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers for lighting systems to adjust illumination"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns, ComfortLevels
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlerts
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization of building systems based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting and shading for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComfortLevels
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlerts
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building model using Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns, ComfortLevels, PredictiveMaintenanceAlerts
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting systems using reinforcement learning to balance energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLighting
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering process involving automated extraction of BIM semantics, generation of runtime interfaces via model-to-text transformations, and standardized extension points for future service integration and digital twin evolution"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessInsight
]

instance EnergyUsagePatterns : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy usage patterns for building optimization decisions"
]

instance ComfortLevels : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comfort levels in building spaces for occupant well-being"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive alerts for maintenance needs to prevent failures"
]

instance TwinningProcessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated extraction of BIM semantics and model-to-text transformations for digital twin evolution"
]

instance AdjustLighting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting lighting levels based on real-time sensor data and reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in the AECO domain, specifically a Living Lab case study, represented as a virtual counterpart for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations through unified virtual representations of physical assets"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, BIMModel, ModularArchitectureModel, RealTimeOperationalData, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, Revit, RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, Interactive3DVisualizationService, AdaptiveLightingService, TwinningProcessService, EnergyUsagePatterns, ComfortLevels, PredictiveMaintenanceAlerts, AdjustLighting, TwinningProcessInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting commands) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to physical actuators and controllers for real-time adjustments of building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates as physical sensor data is received, enabling immediate response to changes in the physical environment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented constellation where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and extensible service components for monitoring, simulation, and optimization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with BIM serving as a semantic backbone for life cycle-encompassing optimization across design, construction, and operational stages, focusing on post-occupancy sensor data for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, with synchronization mechanisms to prevent semantic drift and ensure alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins through MQTT-based IoT connectivity and REST APIs."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external IoT platforms and building management systems via standardized protocols (MQTT, REST) using Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling data exchange beyond the digital twin system."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), MQTT for IoT communication, and OASIS standards for Eclipse Hono and Ditto to ensure interoperability and consistent data exchange."
]
